scripts.db:migrate:auth:local: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/migrations/002_auth.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/migrations/003_profile_owner.sql
scripts.db:migrate:auth:remote: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/migrations/002_auth.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/migrations/003_profile_owner.sql
scripts.db:migrate:gallery:local: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/migrations/005_gallery.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/migrations/005b_media_gallery_kind.sql
scripts.db:migrate:gallery:remote: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/migrations/005_gallery.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/migrations/005b_media_gallery_kind.sql
scripts.db:migrate:fonts:local: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/migrations/006_custom_fonts.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/migrations/006b_media_font_kind.sql
scripts.db:migrate:fonts:remote: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/migrations/006_custom_fonts.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/migrations/006b_media_font_kind.sql
scripts.db:seed:local: npm run emit:seed && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/seed-auth.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: npm run emit:seed && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --remote --file=./db/seed-auth.sql
scripts.db:sync:local: wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/schema.sql && (wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/patches/demo-bios-romina-theme.sql || true) && (wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/patches/sample-profile-tags.sql || true) && wrangler d1 execute dimela-mx --local --file=./db/seed-auth.sql
scripts.dev:all: npx --yes concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev"
scripts.deploy:tags: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env tags
